titleStmt.title: SII 25.146: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 146. (A.R. No. 146 of 1908.) KUḶḶAPUṞAM, PERIYAKULAM TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Nīlakaṇṭhēśvara temple.

This inscription in characters of 13th Century refers to an order of the king's official Aḻagapperumāḷ Śokkaṉ alias Āṇmai-Aḻagiyāṉ issued to the tāṉattār and of dēvakaṉmis of Tirumarunduṟai-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār temple and Rājarāja-Īśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār temple at Kūḍalūr alias Rājachūḍāmaṇichaturvēdimaṅgalam in Aḷa-nāḍu in regard to the grant of income from taxes on lands made as iṟaiyili. The taxes collected on the 31 mā, kāṇi dēvadāṉa lands of the temples measured by Āṇmai-Aḻagiyāṉ-kōl include ugavai, and peruvari inclusive of kuḍirnai-iṟai, pariykārāṇmai, puḷḷichchōṟu, pāḍikāval, Vaṇṇagakkūli, etc., were granted as iṟaiyili and the paddy of 690 kalam was provided for the daily food-offerings as well as on festival days, to the god, and for the viṉjanam to the nimandakkāṟar. The balance of the produce was to be provided for the tiruppaṇi in the temples. The share was to be made in the taxes collected thus.

The order was engraved by Appaṉ Kāḍaṉ alias Kodukula-āchāri, who was holding the tachchāchāriyam in the temple. Of the taxes mentioned in the record, a few are very interesting to note, for e.g., puḷḷichchōṟu meaning ‘tax for the estimation of products’, vaṇṇagakkūli meaning ‘tax for testing coins’. The term vaṇṇaga refers to an official tester of coins.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ Aruḷicceyal . Aḷanāṭṭuk kūṭalūrāṉa Irāja cūṭāmaṇic caturvvetimaṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tirumarutantuṟaiyuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyili
lum Uṭaiyār Irā[ja*]rā[ja*] Īśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyiṟ tāṉattāṟkum tevakaṉmikkum Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉamāṉa nilam kaṇṇaṉ paḷḷatti
lum veṭṭikkāṭṭilum tiḷāṅkāṭṭilum Oḷḷattilum meṟciṟumaṭaiyiluṅ kuḷakkiḻum ceypeṟṟilum puṟakkālilum Ippaṟṟukaḷil
piṭāriyār nilamuṭpaṭa nāṅkuṭutta nilam Āṇmai Aḻakiyāṉ kolāl nila muppattoru māk kāṇiyum nāyaṉār cuntarapāṇṭiya tevarkkup
patiṉeḻāvatu ṉetirā māṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal Ukavai Iṟukku māṇṭukaḷ Oṉṟu pāti Iṟuttuk kuṭimai Iṟaivariy
kārāṇmai puḷḷic coṟu pāṭikāval vaṇṇakkūli Uḷḷinta peruvari maṟṟu meppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Iṟaiyiliyāka nirvārttut tantom . Ippa
ṭi Eḻuntaruḷivikkum tirunāḷukkup palaviñjanaṅkaḷuṭpaṭa nellu nūṟṟaimpatiṉ kalamum nittal nivantam Amutupaṭikku nimantakkāṟa
ruṭpaṭa maṟṟu meppeṟpaṭṭa palaviñjanaṅkaḷukkum nellu Aiñnūṟṟu nāṟpatiṉ kalamum pokki nikki Uḷḷatu tiruppaṇik kuṭalākak koṇṭu
variyilum piṟittuk koḷka . Ippaṭi candrādityavat celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koḷka Ivai Aḻakap perumāḷ co
kkaṉāṉa Āṇmai Aḻakiyāṉ tuvārapati veḷāṉ Eḻuttu .
Aruḷic cey kallil veṭṭiṉeṉ Ikkoyit taccāriyam Appaṉ kāṭaṉāṉa kotu kulavācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 25.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
